title: Andonium Offical Continued
description: Andonium Continued is a Mod that adds new Ore, Tools And More
body:
**Andonium is a mod that Adds new features like Andonium Ore, Tools And More.**

All of these new features are

- andonium ore
- andonoum
- the andonium pickaxe
- the andonium axe
- andonium armor
- hot chocolate
- vanilla beans
- vanilla extract
- butter
- marshmallows
- whipped cream

![Andonium ore ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/377eae28911890a64a27ca493e7a7e17104b21dc_0.webp)
